ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, pressure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "communication_protocol" TEXT /* Communication protocol used by the sensor (e.g., Wi-Fi, LoRaWAN, GSM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading in degree Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading in hPa */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage reading in V */,
  "rssi" REAL /* RSSI reading */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the sensor above ground level */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the sensor to the central server */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the sensor (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  "installation_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sensor installation (e.g., indoor, outdoor, underground) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for generating the alert */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, API call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., cleaning, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)
